PHASE ONE: PRODUCT CREATION FOUNDATIONS
Lesson 2: The Magic Formula for Success
ВЁпӮЁ Product creation success comes down to two things: Mindset and Confidence
ВЁпӮЁ Product creation is easier than ever before given the low-cost technology at your
disposal
ВЁпӮЁ DonвҖҷt let those вҖңdream stealersвҖқ or вҖңnaysayersвҖқ out there tell you that вҖңYou CanвҖҷt Do
ItвҖқ
Lesson 3: WhatвҖҷs Your Perfect Day?
ВЁпӮЁ Sit down and write down вҖңYour Perfect DayвҖқ
o 	What would be the first thing you do?
o 	Who would you interact with?
o 	How would you go through your day?
o 	Where would you be living
o 	What would your home be like?
o 	What would your rituals be like?
ВЁпӮЁ Write down at least two вҖңBIG GOALSвҖқ you want to accomplish in your business
Lesson 4: The Secrets to Creating a Killer Product
ВЁпӮЁ Always remember these two secrets of success
o 	Build an email list
o 	Create products that the market wants
ВЁпӮЁ Interact with the audience LOTS to find out what they want
ВЁпӮЁ Go to targeted forums and social networks to gather information on questions people
have
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 23 --

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 4 of 23
ВЁпӮЁ Run some paid advertising that includes a survey to gather more information from
your target audience
ВЁпӮЁ Be careful not to fall in love with your ideaвҖҰcreate what the market wants
ВЁпӮЁ Remember that most people are beginners
ВЁпӮЁ Fictional Guitar example:
o 	5 million people interested in guitars
o 	2.5 million will take the guitar out of the case
o 	1.25 million will go beyond that first week to the beginner stage
o 	50,000 competent guitar players
o 	1,000 expert guitar players
ВЁпӮЁ There are always more beginners then experts
ВЁпӮЁ RememberвҖҰperfection is your enemy. Get your product out there!
ВЁпӮЁ When you create a product, write your sales letter first!
o 	Forces you to create a great offer
o 	You wonвҖҷt get caught up in creating perfect, but creating results
o 	You will get paid to bring value, results to people
o 	Need to build value into the pitch, which forces you to add value to your
product
ВЁпӮЁ Make the shift from perfection mode to value creation mode
Lesson 5: How to вҖңMove the Free LineвҖқ
ВЁпӮЁ Remember Eben PaganвҖҷs concept, вҖңMove the Free LineвҖқ
ВЁпӮЁ As you move the free line, giving massive value and awesome free content, then your
price will increase and you can charge higher prices
ВЁпӮЁ Jeff never wants to compete on priceвҖҰdonвҖҷt be an вҖңOnline WalmartвҖқ.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 23 --

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 5 of 23
ВЁпӮЁ Two ways to charge more:
o 	Move the free line
o 	Create tremendous value in your products
ВЁпӮЁ It is much easier to sell 1,000 people a $1,000 product then 1,000,000 people a $1
product
ВЁпӮЁ You want to sell on value NOT on price
ВЁпӮЁ It is inevitable that the ones that pay more for your high-priced product will actually
be opening it up and using it
ВЁпӮЁ Deliver value at all costs
Lesson 6: Know Your Math
ВЁпӮЁ Internet businesses sometimes employ an вҖңArbitrage PlayвҖқ:
o 	Buy something in one market for one price and sell it in another market for
another price
ВЁпӮЁ Example
o 	One product вҖ“ 10% refund rate on $1,000 ($900 net)
o 	Another product вҖ“ 50% refund rate on a $10,000 product ($5,000 net)
ВЁпӮЁ Conversion rates vary significantly depending on price point and market
Lesson 7: Perception is Everything!
ВЁпӮЁ Value perception is critical to the success of your products
ВЁпӮЁ If you have discounts and sales all the time, then you have killed the perceived
valueвҖҰpeople will just wait for the discounts
ВЁпӮЁ Changing the format of a product can change the value perception
ВЁпӮЁ Example Book
o 	вҖңRiver Rescue BookвҖқ - $20
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

o 	Workshop (similar information) - $200-$500
o 	Laminated Cards - $20 (huge value)
ВЁпӮЁ Make your products FUNGIBLE
o 	Take that information and mold/re-shape to appeal to different people
o 	Different formats
o 	Radically changes your results
ВЁпӮЁ See a perfect example of this in the two video case examples provided with this lesson

PHASE TWO: PRODUCT CREATION STRATEGY
Lesson 8: How to Select Your Niche
ВЁпӮЁ Key questions to consider:
o 	What should my product be about?
o 	What should I publish about?
o 	What do I know that I can share with people?
o 	What have I been doing for five years or more?
o 	What have I been working on?
o 	What is my passion area?
o 	What do people ask me about?
o 	What comes super easy to me?
ВЁпӮЁ Different ways to find your niche
o 	Follow your Bliss (Joseph Campbell) вҖ“ do what you love
o 	Be a Mercenary вҖ“ find a good market and publish yourself or find an expert to
publish
ВЁпӮЁ Test the Market
o 	Are people selling in these markets?
o 	If there is NO competition, then be very careful
o 	Find a market and be successful in and be better
o 	Find a market that people are passionate about
Lesson 9: Secrets to Finding a Rabid Market
ВЁпӮЁ People often will buy one course after another and never go through it or just review it
a bit
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 23 --

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 8 of 23
ВЁпӮЁ Buying a product makes your prospect feel like they have accomplished something
(the psychology of people buying a lot of information)
ВЁпӮЁ If you have a rabid market, you will find information junkies who will buy your
product and may not even use it
Lesson 10: вҖңBe the Wizard, Beware the WizardвҖқ
ВЁпӮЁ DonвҖҷt вҖңFake it until you make itвҖқ (this can adversely affect peopleвҖҷs lives)
ВЁпӮЁ Dan Kennedy popular, saying вҖңBe the wizard, beware the wizardвҖқ
o 	You are becoming the вҖңwizardвҖқ in your market
o 	OR you are the marketer bringing the вҖңwizardвҖқ to your market
ВЁпӮЁ Beware the wizard вҖ“ be careful of who you are learning from
Lesson 11: Identifying Your Unique Connection Point
ВЁпӮЁ Find a вҖңUnique Connection PointвҖқ with your market
o 	Discover a way to connect with your market and show your personality and
who you are
o 	People donвҖҷt like to buy from corporationsвҖҰthey like to buy from people they
вҖңknow-like-trustвҖқ
ВЁпӮЁ Create a connection point by sharing your experience, personality and stories
ВЁпӮЁ People commonly remember stories or a teaching point that was conveyed through a
story
ВЁпӮЁ Stories keep your audience interested and engaged
ВЁпӮЁ Be personable and human
ВЁпӮЁ You can sell a lot more from a вҖңpersonality-basedвҖқ business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 9 of 23
Lesson 12: Finding Experts
ВЁпӮЁ You donвҖҷt need to be the expertвҖҰyou can be the вҖңmarketing expertвҖқ
ВЁпӮЁ Find the expert and partner up
o 	Experts are a dime a dozen regardless of the topic
ВЁпӮЁ Think of a hobby and do a search on Amazon.com
o 	Books written by experts
ВЁпӮЁ Things to remember when partnering with an expert:
o 	Establish written agreement with the expert
В§пӮ§ 	Write it down so you clearly know what you are both agreeing to
o 	Maintain ownership at all costs (51% at least)
В§пӮ§ 	Ideally 70/30 split
o 	Experts must be exceptional
В§пӮ§ 	Awesome skills
В§пӮ§ 	Great person
В§пӮ§ 	Select someone who values you for your marketing skills
o 	Remember, you bring more value than the expert
Lesson 13: Product Creation Mindset
ВЁпӮЁ Two ways to create a product
o 	Your expertise
o 	Outside expertise
ВЁпӮЁ Your expertise
o 	What are you passionate about?
o 	What do people ask you about?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 23 --

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 10 of 23
o 	What subject is really easy for you?
o 	WhatвҖҷs always on your mind?
ВЁпӮЁ Outside expertise
o 	Find experts on blogs
o 	Find experts on forums
o 	Find experts through Amazon (published books)
o 	Marketplace (guru, elance)
o 	Expertise is all around waiting to be captured
ВЁпӮЁ Identify hot questions in your market
o 	What are the questions that keep showing up in the forums?
o 	How do you answer these questions?
o 	What are the вҖңbasicsвҖқ that everyone must know?
o 	What are the вҖңNinja tricksвҖқ that you can teach?
ВЁпӮЁ Look at the possible market gaps
o 	What is the biggest gap in your marketplace?
o 	What is not being covered by other products?
o 	What are the best magazines and top articles that keep coming up?
o 	What are the best books?
ВЁпӮЁ Key takeaways
o 	YouвҖҷve got more expertise then you think you do
o 	Avoid the вҖңCurse of KnowledgeвҖқ вҖ“ hard to remember what it was like to be a
beginner
o 	You can get help with your productвҖҰthere are lots of experts out there
o 	Selling вҖңBasicsвҖқ is always a solid business modelвҖҰlots of beginners in every
market
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

o 	DonвҖҷt be scared by lots of competition in your marketвҖҰlots of competition
shows it is a healthy marketplace
Lesson 14: Product Creation Foundation
ВЁпӮЁ Identify your purpose(s) for creating your product
o 	Make money
o 	Build a list of clients
o 	Drive traffic
o 	Build a list of partners
o 	Build positioning
В§пӮ§ 	There is certainly lots of overlap in these areas
ВЁпӮЁ Determine if this is a product your market wants
o 	What are people saying in the forums
В§пӮ§ 	Example: Google вҖңLearn Guitar ForumsвҖқ
o 	Are advertisers spending money
o 	Is there some competition
ВЁпӮЁ Identify your price point
o 	Need to test the product to find the pricing вҖңsweet spotвҖқ
o 	Review competitor pricing and determine what the market will pay
В§пӮ§ 	Look at the most expensive products and the cheapest ones to see
where your product might fit
В§пӮ§ 	If you create more value and have better marketing, it allows you to be
at the high end
ВЁпӮЁ Determine your production cost
o 	What does it cost to produce the product?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

o 	Does it give you enough margin?
Lesson 15: Product Creation vs Affiliate Marketing
Affiliate Marketing
ВЁпӮЁ PROS
o 	Simple and easy to get started
o 	No product creation costs
o 	Able to focus just on traffic generation
o 	No support costs
o 	Simple technology
ВЁпӮЁ CONS
o 	Zero control of sales funnel
o 	Inability to manage customer relationships
o 	Hard to set-up your own offers and upsells
o 	Hard to build a list- Less then 100% of the profit
Product Creation
ВЁпӮЁ PROS
o 	Control over the whole process
o 	Keep 100% of the profits
o 	Easier to build relationship with prospects and buyers
В§пӮ§ 	Someone on client list is worth 15 times more than a prospect list
o 	Easier to build list
o 	Great data on what works in the market
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 23 --

В© 2016 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Product Creation Code вҖ“ Cliff Notes
Page 13 of 23
o 	Ability to create a brand new niche or sub-niche
o 	Ability to get affiliates working for you
ВЁпӮЁ CONS
o 	Customer support issues and maintenance
o 	Higher risk due to uncertainty of success in the market
o 	More technical complexities in the process
o 	More time, energy and cost
ВЁпӮЁ Remember, affiliate marketing can be a money maker, but it is not a business
ВЁпӮЁ Easy to start in affiliate marketing, but look to create your own products as soon as
possible
ВЁпӮЁ One good strategy is to partner with your competitors and promote each others
products

o 	Use audio

o 	Write content
В§пӮ§ 	Work off of an outline
В§пӮ§ 	Use вҖңHot Pen TechniqueвҖқ - Start typing and DONвҖҷT let yourself stop

o 	Bundle products together

В§пӮ§ 	Transform content

В§пӮ§ 	Momentum creates momentum
В§пӮ§ 	DonвҖҷt sit around too long thinking about your product
вҖў 	Breeds procrastination and failure
В§пӮ§ 	Get the first version of your product out there
В§пӮ§ 	Gives you the ability to test multiple markets and pricing
В§пӮ§ 	Faster feedback from the market
В§пӮ§ 	DonвҖҷt put all your eggs in one вҖңproductвҖқ basket

PHASE THREE: PRODUCT CREATION FORMATS AND TOOLS
Lesson 17: Product Storyteller
ВЁпӮЁ Always look to add stories in your products or turn your product into a story (very
powerful)
ВЁпӮЁ Four roles to play in product creation
o 	Interviewer
В§пӮ§ 	Gather experts and interview them on the same or different topics
o 	Expert
В§пӮ§ 	Teacher or guru
o 	Researcher
В§пӮ§ 	Research market, gather data and convert to a product
ВЁпӮЁ Bundler
В§пӮ§ 	Bundle together other products that you have private-label rights (re-
sell rights)
В§пӮ§ 	Bundle several products and add in your own stuff
Lesson 18: Product Formats, Part One
ВЁпӮЁ Audio product
o 	Simplest product to create
o 	Inexpensive
o 	Ideal for interview-style products
ВЁпӮЁ Video product
o 	Hot medium right now
o 	Lot more impactful than audio

o 	Trade published or self-published

Lesson 20: Product Formats, Part Three
ВЁпӮЁ Continuity programs
o 	People pay you ongoing monthly fee
o 	Membership sites
o 	Training course (monthly training product)
o 	Newsletter (physical or enewsletter)
o 	CDs or DVD of the month
ВЁпӮЁ Benefit of continuity program is that you keep getting paid
ВЁпӮЁ Main challenge is the need to keep adding new people
o 	Your renewal rate will be your most important metric
ВЁпӮЁ Home study courses
o 	Not as common these days as products are more digital
ВЁпӮЁ Coaching programs
o 	Group calls or webinars
o 	Download guides / PDFs
